age-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Exact Age
age-calculator.description: Use the Age Calculator to find your exact age in years, months, and days along with your zodiac signs, generation, and birthday countdown.
steps: Enter your birth date in the birth date field.
Optionally set an as-of date to calculate your age on a specific day, or leave it blank to use today.
Click Calculate to see your exact age in years, months, and days.
Review your zodiac sign, Chinese zodiac, generation, birthday countdown, and fun statistics.
Bookmark or share the page link to save your calculation.

auto-loan-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Monthly Car Payment
auto-loan-calculator.description: Determine your monthly auto loan payment based on the vehicle price, down payment, interest rate, and loan term.
steps: Enter the vehicle purchase price
Add your down payment or trade-in value
Input the annual interest rate from your lender or pre-approval
Select the loan term (36, 48, 60, or 72 months)
Optionally add sales tax rate for your state
Click Calculate to see your monthly payment and total loan cost

baby-name-generator.name: How to generate baby name ideas
baby-name-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Baby Name Generator to find name ideas filtered by gender, origin, starting letter, length, and popularity.
steps: Choose a gender filter, or leave it open to see names for any gender.
Select one or more origins, such as Irish, Hebrew, Greek, or Latin, to match your heritage or style.
Optionally set a starting letter, preferred name length, and a popularity preference (common vs. unique).
Click Generate to see a list of matching baby names with meanings and origins.
Review the suggestions, save your favorites, and click Generate again for more ideas until you find the perfect name.

bmi-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your BMI (Body Mass Index)
bmi-calculator.description: Calculate your BMI to understand where you fall on the weight scale using height and weight measurements.
steps: Select your measurement system (Imperial: feet/lbs or Metric: cm/kg)
Enter your height in the appropriate units
Enter your current weight
Optionally enter your age and gender for more accurate health insights
Click Calculate to see your BMI score and health category
Review the healthy weight range for your height

body-fat-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Body Fat Percentage
body-fat-calculator.description: Estimate your body fat percentage, fat mass, and lean mass using the Navy method or skinfold calipers.
steps: Choose your unit system (Imperial in pounds and inches, or Metric in kilograms and centimeters).
Enter your age and select your gender.
Enter your height and weight.
Select a method: U.S. Navy (body measurements), 3-Site Skinfold, or 7-Site Skinfold.
Enter the required measurements for your chosen method, such as neck and waist (and hip for women) for the Navy method, or the caliper skinfold readings.
Click Calculate to see your estimated body fat percentage along with your fat mass and lean mass.

break-even-calculator.name: How to calculate your break-even point
break-even-calculator.description: Find the units and revenue you need to cover all costs using fixed costs, variable cost, and selling price.
steps: Enter your total monthly fixed costs, such as rent, salaries, and insurance.
Enter the variable cost per unit, the cost that rises with each item you produce or sell.
Enter the selling price per unit you charge customers.
Optionally add your expected monthly units sold and a target monthly profit to see safety margin and profit goals.
Click Calculate to see your break-even point in units and revenue, contribution margin, and profit scenarios.

budget-calculator.name: How to Create a Monthly Budget
budget-calculator.description: Use the 50/30/20 rule to create a balanced budget based on your income and expenses.
steps: Enter your monthly after-tax income (take-home pay)
List your fixed expenses (rent, utilities, insurance, minimum debt payments)
Add your variable expenses (groceries, transportation, subscriptions)
Review the suggested 50/30/20 allocation for your income
Adjust categories to match your priorities and financial goals
Click Calculate to see your budget breakdown and savings potential

business-days-calculator.name: How to Calculate Business Days Between Dates
business-days-calculator.description: Use the Business Days Calculator to count workdays between two dates or to add and subtract business days, excluding weekends and holidays.
steps: Select a calculation type: business days between dates, add, or subtract.
For a date range, enter the start date and end date.
For add or subtract, enter the base date and the number of business days.
Select your country so the correct public holidays are excluded.
Click Calculate to see the business-day count or resulting date.

business-name-generator.name: How to generate a business name
business-name-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Business Name Generator to create memorable company and brand name ideas from your keywords and preferred style.
steps: Enter one or more keywords that describe your industry, product, or brand personality.
Pick a naming style, such as modern, classic, playful, professional, or abstract.
Click Generate to produce a list of unique business name suggestions.
Shortlist the names you like and check domain and trademark availability for each.
Generate again with different keywords or styles to explore more options until you find the right name.

calorie-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Daily Calorie Needs
calorie-calculator.description: Determine your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) and recommended calorie intake for your fitness goals.
steps: Enter your age, gender, height, and current weight
Select your activity level from sedentary to very active
Choose your goal: lose weight, maintain weight, or gain muscle
Click Calculate to see your TDEE and recommended daily calories
Review your personalized macro breakdown (protein, carbs, fats)

calories-burned-calculator.name: How to Calculate Calories Burned During Exercise
calories-burned-calculator.description: Estimate calories burned for any activity using your weight, the activity type, duration, and intensity.
steps: Enter your body weight and choose your unit (lbs or kg).
Select your activity from the dropdown of 150+ options, such as jogging, cycling, or swimming.
Enter the duration of the activity in minutes.
Select the intensity level (light, moderate, or vigorous).
Click Calculate to see calories burned along with food equivalents, comparisons, and weekly projections.

car-lease-buy-calculator.name: How to compare leasing vs buying a car
car-lease-buy-calculator.description: See the true total cost of leasing versus financing a car including fees, taxes, equity, and ongoing costs.
steps: Enter the vehicle's sticker price, your negotiated price, expected annual depreciation, and your sales tax rate.
Fill in lease details: monthly payment, term, down payment, acquisition and disposition fees, residual value, mileage allowance, and excess-mileage cost.
Fill in purchase details: down payment, loan interest rate, loan term, and dealer and registration fees.
Enter ongoing monthly insurance and maintenance estimates for both the lease and the purchase.
Click Calculate to compare total cost, equity, and the better option over your ownership period.

celsius-to-fahrenheit.name: How to Convert Celsius to Fahrenheit
celsius-to-fahrenheit.description: Convert celsius to fahrenheit in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in celsius (°C) you want to convert
The result in fahrenheit (°F) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common temperature conversions

cm-to-inches.name: How to Convert Centimeters to Inches
cm-to-inches.description: Convert centimeters to inches in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in centimeters (cm) you want to convert
The result in inches (in) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common length conversions

college-savings-calculator.name: How to calculate your college savings goal with a 529 plan
college-savings-calculator.description: Project how much to save in a 529 plan to reach your child's future college costs.
steps: Enter your child's current age in years.
Set the expected college start age (default is 18).
Select the college type: in-state public, out-of-state public, or private.
Enter your current 529 plan balance.
Set your planned monthly contribution amount.
Adjust the expected investment return rate and college cost inflation rate if needed.
Click Calculate to see your projected savings, the cost gap, and whether you're on track.

color-generator.name: How to generate a random color
color-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Color Generator to create random colors with HEX, RGB, and HSL codes for your design and development projects.
steps: Click Generate to produce a random color.
View the HEX, RGB, and HSL values shown for the color.
Keep generating until you find a color you like, or use it to start a palette.
Check the contrast ratio if the color will be used for text or backgrounds.
Click to copy the HEX, RGB, or HSL code and paste it into your project.

compound-interest-calculator.name: How to Calculate Compound Interest on Your Investments
compound-interest-calculator.description: Calculate how your money grows over time with compound interest using our free calculator.
steps: Enter your initial investment or principal amount
Set your expected annual interest rate or rate of return
Choose how long you plan to invest (in years)
Select compounding frequency (daily, monthly, quarterly, or annually)
Add any recurring monthly contributions you plan to make
Click Calculate to see your projected growth and total returns

construction-calculator.name: How to Estimate Construction Materials and Costs
construction-calculator.description: Use the Construction Material Calculator to estimate quantities and costs for concrete, decking, fencing, drywall, flooring, roofing, paint, or insulation projects.
steps: Select your project type from the dropdown (concrete, decking, fencing, drywall, flooring, roofing, paint, or insulation).
Choose the relevant sub-options, such as concrete shape and type or the fence/decking material.
Enter the project dimensions in feet, such as length, width, thickness, height, or diameter.
Click Calculate to see the estimated material quantities and shopping list.
Review the cost range and adjust dimensions or material choices to fit your budget.

cost-of-living-calculator.name: How to compare the cost of living between cities
cost-of-living-calculator.description: Compare living costs between US cities and find the salary needed to keep your standard of living.
steps: Select your current city from the dropdown.
Select the target city you're considering moving to.
Enter your current annual salary.
Choose your filing status for the tax comparison.
Select your housing status (renter or homeowner).
Enter your household size and whether you have children.
Click Compare Cost of Living to see the full analysis and equivalent salary.

credit-card-payoff-calculator.name: How to calculate your credit card payoff
credit-card-payoff-calculator.description: See how long until your card is paid off and how much interest you will pay under different payment strategies.
steps: Enter your current credit card balance and the card's interest rate (APR).
Choose a payment strategy: minimum payment, a fixed monthly payment, or a target payoff date.
Fill in the matching details, such as your fixed payment amount or the number of months to pay off.
Optionally add an extra monthly payment and the month it starts.
Click Calculate to see your payoff timeline, total interest, and how strategies compare.

cups-to-ml.name: How to Convert Cups to Milliliters
cups-to-ml.description: Convert cups to milliliters in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in cups (cups) you want to convert
The result in milliliters (ml) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common volume conversions

debt-payoff-calculator.name: How to compare debt snowball vs avalanche
debt-payoff-calculator.description: Enter multiple debts to see which payoff strategy clears your debt fastest and saves the most interest.
steps: Add each of your debts, entering the balance, interest rate, and minimum payment for every one.
Use Add Debt to include all your credit cards, loans, and other balances.
Enter the extra monthly payment you can put toward debt beyond the minimums.
Adjust the extra-payment slider to see how more money changes your payoff date.
Click Calculate to compare the snowball and avalanche timelines, total interest, and milestone dates.

debt-to-income-calculator.name: How to Calculate Debt-to-Income Ratio
debt-to-income-calculator.description: Calculate your DTI ratio to see how much of your income goes to debt.
steps: Enter your gross monthly income (before taxes)
Add up your monthly debt payments: housing, loans, and minimum credit card payments
Enter the total monthly debt
Your DTI ratio is monthly debt divided by gross monthly income

discount-calculator.name: How to Calculate a Discount
discount-calculator.description: Find the sale price and your savings for any discount percentage, including stacked discounts and tax.
steps: Enter the original price
Enter the discount percentage (e.g. 25 for 25% off)
Optionally add a second stacked discount or a sales tax rate
Read the sale price, total savings, and effective discount instantly

dog-food-calculator.name: How to Calculate How Much to Feed Your Dog
dog-food-calculator.description: Find your dog's daily feeding portion based on weight, life stage, breed size, activity level, and food calorie density.
steps: Enter your dog's current weight and choose the unit (lbs or kg).
Select a weight goal (maintain, lose, or gain) and enter a target weight if applicable.
Choose your dog's life stage and breed size.
Select your dog's activity level and spay/neuter status.
Choose the food type and enter its calorie density in kcal per cup or can, or pick a food quality tier.
Click Calculate to see your dog's recommended daily feeding portion.

electricity-cost-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Electricity Costs by Appliance
electricity-cost-calculator.description: Use the Electricity Cost Calculator to estimate per-appliance and total monthly or annual electricity costs based on wattage, usage hours, and your kWh rate.
steps: Enter your electricity rate per kWh from your utility bill (default is $0.16).
Choose a billing period of monthly or annual.
Add appliances from the preset library or enter custom names with their wattage and daily hours of use.
Review the per-appliance and total cost breakdown and the chart of which appliances cost the most.
Adjust usage hours or remove devices to see how your total electricity cost changes.

ev-vs-gas-calculator.name: How to Compare EV vs Gas Car Total Cost of Ownership
ev-vs-gas-calculator.description: Use the EV vs Gas Car Calculator to compare lifetime costs of an electric vehicle and a gas car including purchase price, fuel, maintenance, incentives, and depreciation.
steps: Enter the electric vehicle's purchase price, federal tax credit, state incentive, battery size, and efficiency.
Enter the gas car's purchase price and fuel economy.
Add your electricity rate, local gas price, and estimated annual mileage.
Enter maintenance, insurance, and depreciation assumptions for each vehicle.
Click Calculate and review the total cost of ownership and the breakeven year between the two vehicles.

fahrenheit-to-celsius.name: How to Convert Fahrenheit to Celsius
fahrenheit-to-celsius.description: Convert fahrenheit to celsius in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in fahrenheit (°F) you want to convert
The result in celsius (°C) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common temperature conversions

fantasy-name-generator.name: How to generate a fantasy name
fantasy-name-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Fantasy Name Generator to create character names for D&D, fiction, and games across elven, dwarven, sci-fi, and other styles.
steps: Select a genre or race style, such as elven, dwarven, orcish, human medieval, sci-fi, or steampunk.
Choose whether you want a first name, surname, or a full character name.
Click Generate to create a batch of fantasy name ideas.
Review the results and regenerate until a name fits your character's sound and background.
Copy your favorite name to use in your campaign, story, or game.

feet-to-inches.name: How to Convert Feet to Inches
feet-to-inches.description: Convert feet to inches in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in feet (ft) you want to convert
The result in inches (in) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common length conversions

feet-to-meters.name: How to Convert Feet to Meters
feet-to-meters.description: Convert feet to meters in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in feet (ft) you want to convert
The result in meters (m) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common length conversions

fire-calculator.name: How to calculate your FIRE number and timeline
fire-calculator.description: Estimate your Financial Independence, Retire Early number and how many years until you reach it.
steps: Enter your current age and target retirement age.
Input your current invested savings.
Enter your annual income and annual expenses (your expenses drive the FIRE number).
Set your expected investment return rate and your savings rate.
Click Calculate to see your FIRE number, Coast FIRE number, and years to financial independence.
Adjust the what-if scenarios to test higher savings rates or lower expenses and see how your timeline changes.

freelance-rate-calculator.name: How to calculate your ideal freelance hourly rate
freelance-rate-calculator.description: Find the minimum hourly rate you need to charge to hit your income goal after taxes, benefits, and expenses.
steps: Enter your desired annual take-home income (what you want after taxes).
Select your tax region and filing status for the tax estimate.
Add your annual business expenses such as software, equipment, office, marketing, and insurance.
Enter your benefits costs: health insurance premiums and retirement savings goal.
Configure your schedule with vacation days, sick days, holidays, and hours worked per week.
Set your billable utilization rate (the share of working hours you actually bill).
Click Calculate My Rate to see your minimum hourly rate and a full rate card.

gallons-to-liters.name: How to Convert Gallons to Liters
gallons-to-liters.description: Convert gallons to liters in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in gallons (gal) you want to convert
The result in liters (L) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common volume conversions

gas-mileage-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Gas Mileage (MPG)
gas-mileage-calculator.description: Use the Gas Mileage Calculator to find your vehicle's fuel efficiency in MPG, L/100km, or km/L, and estimate fuel cost per mile.
steps: Select MPG Calculator mode and choose your unit system (US miles/gallons or metric).
Pick your input method: total miles driven or start and end odometer readings.
Enter the distance driven (or odometer readings) for the trip.
Enter the amount of fuel used in gallons or liters, and optionally the price per gallon.
Click Calculate to see your fuel efficiency and cost per mile.

gpa-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your GPA
gpa-calculator.description: Calculate your grade point average from course grades and credit hours.
steps: Enter each course name (optional) and its credit hours
Select the letter grade you earned in each course
Add rows for all your courses
Click Calculate to see your GPA on a 4.0 scale

grade-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Weighted Grade Average
grade-calculator.description: Use the Grade Calculator to find your weighted grade average or determine the score you need on a final exam to reach a target grade.
steps: Select Weighted Grade mode to average your current grades.
Enter each assignment's name, score percentage, and weight percentage.
Click Add Assignment to include more entries as needed.
Click Calculate to see your weighted average and letter grade.
Switch to Final Grade Needed mode to enter your current grade, completed weight, desired grade, and final exam weight to find the score you need.

grams-to-ounces.name: How to Convert Grams to Ounces
grams-to-ounces.description: Convert grams to ounces in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in grams (g) you want to convert
The result in ounces (oz) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common weight conversions

home-affordability-calculator.name: How to Calculate Home Affordability
home-affordability-calculator.description: Estimate how much house you can afford based on income, debts, and down payment.
steps: Enter your gross annual or monthly income
Add your monthly debt payments (car, student loans, credit cards)
Enter your planned down payment
Set the interest rate and loan term
Review your maximum affordable home price and monthly payment

home-equity-calculator.name: How to calculate your home equity
home-equity-calculator.description: Estimate your home equity and borrowing power for a HELOC or home equity loan.
steps: Enter your home's current value, and optionally the purchase price, purchase date, and an appreciation rate.
Enter your primary mortgage balance, monthly payment, interest rate, and years remaining.
Add any HELOC balance or other liens against the home.
Set your maximum loan-to-value ratio with the slider and enter an expected HELOC rate.
Click Calculate to see your home equity, LTV ratio, and estimated borrowing power.

home-improvement-cost-calculator.name: How to Estimate Home Improvement Project Costs
home-improvement-cost-calculator.description: Use the Home Improvement Cost Calculator to estimate renovation costs, compare DIY versus professional pricing, and calculate ROI on improvements.
steps: Select your project type, such as kitchen, bathroom, flooring, roofing, or deck.
Choose the relevant sub-options for that project.
Enter your project area in square footage and the number of rooms if prompted.
Select a quality tier: budget, mid-range, or high-end.
Click Calculate to view the estimated cost range, DIY versus professional comparison, and ROI.

hourly-to-salary-calculator.name: How to Convert Hourly Pay to a Salary
hourly-to-salary-calculator.description: Convert an hourly wage into an equivalent annual salary.
steps: Enter your hourly wage
Set your hours worked per week (40 for full-time)
Set your paid weeks per year (usually 52)
Read your annual salary plus weekly and monthly pay

hours-calculator.name: How to Calculate Hours Worked
hours-calculator.description: Calculate hours worked from a start time, end time, and break.
steps: Enter your start time
Enter your end time (overnight shifts are supported)
Enter your break length in minutes
Optionally add an hourly rate to see your pay
Read your hours in decimal and hours:minutes format

inches-to-cm.name: How to Convert Inches to Centimeters
inches-to-cm.description: Convert inches to centimeters in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in inches (in) you want to convert
The result in centimeters (cm) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common length conversions

inches-to-feet.name: How to Convert Inches to Feet
inches-to-feet.description: Convert inches to feet in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in inches (in) you want to convert
The result in feet (ft) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common length conversions

inflation-calculator.name: How to calculate inflation and purchasing power
inflation-calculator.description: Compare the value of money across years or project future purchasing power using CPI data.
steps: Choose a mode: Historical for past inflation data or Projection for a future estimate.
Enter the dollar amount you want to adjust for inflation.
For Historical mode, select the start year and end year to compare.
For Projection mode, enter an annual inflation rate and the number of years to project.
Click Calculate to see the equivalent value and how purchasing power changes.

investment-income-goal-calculator.name: How to calculate your investment income goal
investment-income-goal-calculator.description: Find how much to invest to replace your income and reach financial independence.
steps: Set your income goal by entering your target annual income amount.
Choose your timeframe by selecting how many years you plan to invest.
Click Add Investment to create one or more investment scenarios.
Customize each investment with a name, quantity, amount per investment, and expected return percentage.
Optionally add monthly or annual contributions to accelerate growth.
Click Calculate to see ROI, breakeven timeline, and income projections.

kg-to-lbs.name: How to Convert Kilograms to Pounds
kg-to-lbs.description: Convert kilograms to pounds in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in kilograms (kg) you want to convert
The result in pounds (lbs) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common weight conversions

km-to-miles.name: How to Convert Kilometers to Miles
km-to-miles.description: Convert kilometers to miles in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in kilometers (km) you want to convert
The result in miles (mi) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common distance conversions

kmh-to-mph.name: How to Convert Kilometers per Hour to Miles per Hour
kmh-to-mph.description: Convert kilometers per hour to miles per hour in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in kilometers per hour (km/h) you want to convert
The result in miles per hour (mph) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common speed conversions

lbs-to-kg.name: How to Convert Pounds to Kilograms
lbs-to-kg.description: Convert pounds to kilograms in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in pounds (lbs) you want to convert
The result in kilograms (kg) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common weight conversions

liters-to-gallons.name: How to Convert Liters to Gallons
liters-to-gallons.description: Convert liters to gallons in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in liters (L) you want to convert
The result in gallons (gal) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common volume conversions

loan-amortization-calculator.name: How to Create a Loan Amortization Schedule
loan-amortization-calculator.description: Generate a complete payment schedule showing how each payment splits between principal and interest over the life of your loan.
steps: Enter your total loan amount (principal)
Input your annual interest rate
Select the loan term in years or months
Choose your payment frequency (monthly is most common)
Click Calculate to generate your full amortization schedule
Review the table showing principal vs interest for each payment

lorem-ipsum-generator.name: How to generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text
lorem-ipsum-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Lorem Ipsum Generator to create placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words for your designs and mockups.
steps: Choose a text style, such as classic Lorem Ipsum, hipster, or corporate ipsum.
Select the unit you want to generate: paragraphs, sentences, or words.
Enter the number of paragraphs, sentences, or words you need.
Click Generate to create the placeholder text.
Copy the generated text and paste it into your design, document, or prototype.

macro-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Daily Macros
macro-calculator.description: Find your daily protein, carb, and fat targets based on your body stats, activity level, and fitness goal.
steps: Choose your unit system and enter your weight and height.
Enter your age and select your gender.
Choose your activity level, from Sedentary to Extra Active.
Select your goal: Lose Fat, Maintain Weight, or Build Muscle.
Choose your deficit or surplus intensity and how many meals per day you want to split into.
Click Calculate to see your protein, carb, and fat targets in grams, a calorie breakdown, per-meal splits, and food examples.

meters-to-feet.name: How to Convert Meters to Feet
meters-to-feet.description: Convert meters to feet in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in meters (m) you want to convert
The result in feet (ft) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common length conversions

miles-to-km.name: How to Convert Miles to Kilometers
miles-to-km.description: Convert miles to kilometers in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in miles (mi) you want to convert
The result in kilometers (km) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common distance conversions

ml-to-cups.name: How to Convert Milliliters to Cups
ml-to-cups.description: Convert milliliters to cups in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in milliliters (ml) you want to convert
The result in cups (cups) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common volume conversions

mortgage-payment-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Monthly Mortgage Payment
mortgage-payment-calculator.description: Use our free mortgage calculator to determine your monthly home loan payment including principal, interest, taxes, and insurance.
steps: Enter your home price (the total purchase price of the property)
Add your down payment amount in dollars or as a percentage
Input your annual interest rate (check current rates from your lender)
Select your loan term (15 or 30 years are most common)
Add yearly property taxes and homeowners insurance amounts
PMI is automatically calculated if your down payment is less than 20%
Click Calculate to see your complete monthly payment breakdown

mph-to-kmh.name: How to Convert Miles per Hour to Kilometers per Hour
mph-to-kmh.description: Convert miles per hour to kilometers per hour in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in miles per hour (mph) you want to convert
The result in kilometers per hour (km/h) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common speed conversions

net-worth-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Net Worth
net-worth-calculator.description: Find your net worth by subtracting what you owe from what you own.
steps: List your assets: cash, investments, retirement accounts, home, and vehicles
List your liabilities: mortgage, loans, and credit card balances
Enter the values into the calculator
Your net worth is total assets minus total liabilities

ounces-to-grams.name: How to Convert Ounces to Grams
ounces-to-grams.description: Convert ounces to grams in seconds with our free online converter.
steps: Enter the value in ounces (oz) you want to convert
The result in grams (g) updates instantly
Use the reference table to look up common weight conversions

overtime-calculator.name: How to Calculate Overtime Pay
overtime-calculator.description: Calculate overtime pay and total earnings from your hours and rate.
steps: Enter your hourly rate
Enter your regular hours (typically up to 40)
Enter your overtime hours
Choose your overtime multiplier (1.5 for time and a half)
Read your regular pay, overtime pay, and total

passphrase-generator.name: How to generate a secure passphrase
passphrase-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Passphrase Generator to create memorable, secure passphrases from random words, generated client-side in your browser.
steps: Set the number of words using the slider (3 to 8); four or more is recommended.
Choose a word list style, such as common English, extended, nature, or tech.
Pick a separator (space, hyphen, period, underscore, none, or custom) and set capitalization.
Optionally add a number or symbol to further strengthen the passphrase.
Click Generate Passphrase, review the strength analysis, then copy your passphrase and save it in a password manager.

password-generator.name: How to generate a strong password
password-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Password Generator to create strong, random passwords with customizable length and character types, generated securely in your browser.
steps: Set the password length with the slider or a preset; 16 or more characters is recommended.
Choose which character types to include: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
Optionally open Advanced Options to exclude ambiguous characters or add requirements like start-with-a-letter.
Click Generate Password to create one or several secure passwords at once.
Review the strength meter, then copy your password and save it in a password manager.

paycheck-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Take-Home Pay
paycheck-calculator.description: Estimate your net paycheck after taxes and deductions.
steps: Enter your gross pay and pay frequency
Select your filing status and state
Add pre-tax deductions like 401(k) and health insurance
Review your estimated take-home pay and tax withholding

percentage-calculator.name: How to Calculate a Percentage
percentage-calculator.description: Calculate percentages, percentage change, and what percent one number is of another.
steps: Choose the type of percentage calculation
Enter your numbers
Read the result instantly

pet-name-generator.name: How to generate a pet name
pet-name-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Pet Name Generator to find names for dogs, cats, and other pets, filtered by personality, theme, and length.
steps: Choose your pet type, such as dog, cat, bird, or fish.
Select personality traits like playful, regal, fierce, or cute.
Pick a theme, such as food, human, or nature names, and set a preferred length.
Click Generate to see a list of matching pet name ideas.
Review the suggestions and generate again until you find the perfect name for your pet.

pin-generator.name: How to generate a secure PIN
pin-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch PIN Generator to create secure random PIN codes for cards, devices, and safes, generated client-side in your browser.
steps: Choose a PIN length: 4, 6, or 8 digits, or set a custom length from 3 to 12.
Set how many PINs you want to generate (1 to 20).
Enable the security options to avoid sequential, repeated, common, or birth-year PIN patterns.
Click Generate PINs to create your secure codes.
Review the strength analysis and copy each PIN you need.

pregnancy-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Pregnancy Due Date
pregnancy-calculator.description: Estimate your due date, current trimester, and week-by-week milestones using your last period, conception date, IVF transfer, or ultrasound.
steps: Select how you want to calculate: last menstrual period (LMP), conception date, IVF transfer, or ultrasound.
Enter the relevant date for your chosen method, such as the first day of your last period.
Adjust any additional fields, such as your average cycle length, embryo transfer day, or gestational age at ultrasound.
Optionally set details like pre-pregnancy BMI, whether it is your first pregnancy, and number of babies.
Click Calculate to see your estimated due date, current trimester, and week-by-week milestones.

profit-margin-calculator.name: How to calculate profit margin
profit-margin-calculator.description: Calculate gross, operating, and net profit margins along with markup from your revenue and costs.
steps: Enter your revenue and select its frequency, plus units sold and any other income.
Enter your cost of goods sold (COGS).
Enter operating expenses with their frequency, plus interest expense and depreciation.
Enter your tax rate to calculate net profit after taxes.
Click Calculate to see your gross, operating, and net margins, markup percentage, and dollar profits.

pto-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your PTO Accrual and Balance
pto-calculator.description: Use the PTO Calculator to project your paid time off balance, find how long it takes to accrue target hours, or calculate the dollar value of your PTO.
steps: Choose a mode: Future Balance, Time to Accrue, or PTO Value.
Select your accrual type, such as per pay period, monthly, annually frontloaded, or per hours worked.
Enter your accrual rate (or annual PTO hours) and pay period frequency.
Enter your current PTO balance, an as-of date, and any maximum balance cap.
Click Calculate to see your projected balance, accrual timeline, or PTO value.

qr-code-generator.name: How to generate a QR code
qr-code-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch QR Code Generator to create QR codes for URLs, WiFi, email, phone, SMS, and text, then download them as PNG or SVG.
steps: Select the content type: URL, Text, WiFi, Email, Phone, or SMS.
Enter your content in the fields shown for that type, such as a URL or WiFi name and password.
Optionally adjust the size and error correction level.
Click Generate QR Code to create the code.
Download the QR code as a PNG image or copy it as SVG for your project.

random-number-generator.name: How to generate random numbers
random-number-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Random Number Generator to produce random numbers in any range, with options for quantity, number type, duplicates, and sorting.
steps: Enter your minimum and maximum values, or click a quick-range preset.
Set how many numbers to generate (1 to 1000).
Choose a number type, such as any, integer, odd, even, or prime.
Configure options like allowing duplicates, sorting, or decimal places.
Click Generate Numbers, then copy the results or share your settings via the URL.

recipe-scaler-converter.name: How to Scale and Convert a Recipe
recipe-scaler-converter.description: Use the Recipe Scaler and Converter to resize a recipe for any number of servings and convert between cooking measurements and temperature units.
steps: Enter the original number of servings the recipe makes.
Enter the desired number of servings you want to make.
Add each ingredient with its amount and unit, then click Add Ingredient for more.
Review the scaled ingredient list for your new serving count.
To convert a measurement, enter an amount and choose From and To units, or convert oven temperatures between Fahrenheit and Celsius.

refinance-calculator.name: How to calculate mortgage refinance savings
refinance-calculator.description: Compare your current mortgage to a new loan and find your break-even point and lifetime interest savings.
steps: Enter your current loan balance, interest rate, and remaining term, plus your current monthly payment if known.
Enter the new loan's interest rate and term you are considering.
Enter the estimated closing costs for the refinance.
Enter any points you plan to pay to buy down the rate.
Click Calculate to see your monthly savings, break-even point, and total interest saved over the life of the loan.

rent-vs-buy-calculator.name: How to compare renting vs buying a home
rent-vs-buy-calculator.description: Compare the total long-term cost of renting versus buying, including opportunity cost.
steps: Enter your current monthly rent and its expected annual increase.
Input the home purchase price and your down payment.
Add mortgage details: interest rate and loan term.
Include homeownership costs such as property tax, insurance, HOA, and maintenance.
Set an investment return rate for the opportunity cost calculation.
Choose your time horizon (how many years you plan to stay).
Click Calculate to see the financial comparison and breakeven point.

rental-property-calculator.name: How to analyze a rental property investment
rental-property-calculator.description: Calculate cash flow, cap rate, cash-on-cash return, and ROI for a rental property.
steps: Enter the purchase price and financing details: down payment, loan rate, and term.
Add acquisition costs such as closing costs and renovation or repairs.
Input your expected monthly rental income.
Set the vacancy rate for your market (typically 5 to 10 percent).
Enter operating expenses: property taxes, insurance, HOA, maintenance, and management.
Optionally set growth assumptions for appreciation and annual rent increases.
Click Calculate to see cash flow, ROI, cap rate, and long-term projections.

retirement-income-calculator.name: How to calculate how long your retirement savings will last
retirement-income-calculator.description: Project sustainable retirement withdrawals and see whether your savings will last.
steps: Enter your current retirement savings balance.
Set your desired annual withdrawal amount.
Input your expected investment return rate.
Add an inflation rate so withdrawals rise realistically over time.
Choose your retirement timeline in years.
Click Calculate to see whether your money lasts and a year-by-year breakdown.

retirement-planning-calculator.name: How to Calculate How Much You Need to Retire
retirement-planning-calculator.description: Estimate your retirement savings goal and determine if you're on track based on your age, income, and savings rate.
steps: Enter your current age and desired retirement age
Input your current retirement savings balance
Add your monthly contribution amount
Set your expected annual return rate (typically 7-10% for stock market)
Enter your estimated annual expenses in retirement
Click Calculate to see if you'll reach your retirement goal

roi-calculator.name: How to calculate ROI
roi-calculator.description: Calculate return on investment and payback period for investments, marketing campaigns, or projects.
steps: Choose your ROI type: investment, marketing, project, or real estate.
Name the investment and set the time period and unit (months or years).
Enter your initial investment and any additional costs.
Enter your returns: final value or recurring income, or campaign and property metrics for those modes.
Optionally add risk-free and inflation rates, then click Calculate to see your ROI percentage and payback period.

salary-to-hourly-calculator.name: How to Convert Salary to an Hourly Rate
salary-to-hourly-calculator.description: Convert an annual salary into an equivalent hourly wage.
steps: Enter your gross annual salary
Set your hours worked per week (40 for full-time)
Set your paid weeks per year (usually 52)
Read your hourly rate plus daily, weekly, and monthly pay

sales-commission-calculator.name: How to calculate your sales commission
sales-commission-calculator.description: Calculate total earnings from commissions, quotas, accelerators, and bonuses across your sales.
steps: Choose your commission type: percentage of sale, flat rate per sale, or tiered commission.
Enter your base commission rate (or set up tiers) and any base salary for the time period.
Enter your sales quota, quota bonus, accelerator rate, and income goal if they apply.
Add your sales entries, or use Quick Entry Mode to enter total sales and deal count.
Click Calculate to see your total commission, bonuses, and projected earnings.

sales-tax-calculator.name: How to Calculate Sales Tax
sales-tax-calculator.description: Calculate sales tax and the total price, or work backward to find the pre-tax price, with our free calculator.
steps: Enter the amount — the pre-tax price, or the total if you're removing tax
Enter the sales tax rate, or pick your state to auto-fill the base rate
Choose 'Add tax' to add tax to a price, or 'Remove tax' to find the pre-tax price
Read the tax amount, total, and pre-tax price in the results

savings-goal-calculator.name: How to Calculate Monthly Savings for a Goal
savings-goal-calculator.description: Find out how much to save each month to reach a savings goal.
steps: Enter your savings goal amount
Set your timeframe in months or years
Add your current savings and expected interest rate
See the monthly contribution needed to reach your goal

self-employment-tax-calculator.name: How to estimate your self-employment quarterly taxes
self-employment-tax-calculator.description: Estimate SE tax plus federal and state income tax and your quarterly estimated payments as a freelancer.
steps: Enter your gross self-employment income for the year.
Enter your total deductible business expenses.
Select your filing status, such as single or married filing jointly.
Choose your state so state income tax is included in the estimate.
Click Calculate to see your SE tax, federal and state income tax, quarterly payment amounts, and safe harbor figures.

size-converter.name: How to Convert International Clothing and Shoe Sizes
size-converter.description: Use the International Size Converter to convert clothing, shoe, and accessory sizes between US, UK, EU, and other sizing systems.
steps: Choose Convert Known Size mode.
Select the category, such as women's tops, men's pants, shoes, rings, or bras.
Pick the source sizing system you know (US, UK, or EU).
Select your size in that system.
Click Calculate to see the equivalent sizes in other systems, or switch to Find Size by Measurements to enter body measurements instead.

sleep-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Ideal Bedtime or Wake Time
sleep-calculator.description: Find optimal bedtimes, wake times, or nap times based on 90-minute sleep cycles and your age.
steps: Choose a mode: calculate a wake time, calculate a bedtime, or plan a nap.
Enter the relevant time, such as the time you need to wake up or the time you plan to go to bed.
Adjust how long it typically takes you to fall asleep (the default is 15 minutes).
Select your age group to get age-specific sleep recommendations.
Click Calculate to see suggested times aligned with complete 90-minute sleep cycles.

social-security-calculator.name: How to estimate and optimize your Social Security benefits
social-security-calculator.description: Estimate your Social Security benefit and find the optimal claiming age with breakeven analysis.
steps: Enter your current age and birth year.
Input your average annual earnings (or current salary as a proxy) and years worked.
Set your expected retirement age, when you'll stop working.
Select your planned claiming age between 62 and 70 and your marital status (add spouse details if married).
Adjust the expected annual COLA and your life expectancy estimate, and indicate whether you'll keep working.
Click Calculate to see your benefit at 62, Full Retirement Age, and 70 with breakeven analysis.

startup-cost-calculator.name: How to estimate your business startup costs
startup-cost-calculator.description: Build a realistic startup budget with total costs, runway, and cash flow projections.
steps: Select your business type to auto-fill typical cost ranges.
Enter your one-time startup costs such as legal, equipment, and buildout.
Enter your monthly recurring costs such as rent, payroll, and marketing.
Add revenue projections for months 1, 6, and 12.
Set your available funding and desired runway.
Click Calculate to see total costs, runway, and cash flow projections.

student-loan-calculator.name: How to calculate student loan payments
student-loan-calculator.description: Compare repayment plans, income-driven options, and forgiveness to find the best student loan strategy.
steps: Add each student loan with its balance and interest rate using Add Loan.
Enter your annual income, family size, and state to enable income-driven plan estimates.
Select a repayment plan such as standard, graduated, extended, or an income-driven option.
Mark whether you are eligible for PSLF if you work in public service.
Optionally add extra monthly or yearly payments, then click Calculate to see payments, payoff time, and total interest.

subscription-calculator.name: How to audit your subscription spending
subscription-calculator.description: Total your subscriptions and find rarely-used services and potential savings.
steps: Check the subscriptions you have from the common services listed by category.
Adjust the price for any subscription whose plan differs from the default.
Set how often you actually use each service.
Add custom subscriptions for any services not already listed.
Click Calculate to see your total monthly and annual spending, potential savings, and insights.

tax-bracket-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your Federal Tax Bracket
tax-bracket-calculator.description: Find your marginal and effective tax rates based on your taxable income and filing status.
steps: Enter your annual gross income
Select your filing status (single, married filing jointly, head of household)
Add any deductions (standard or itemized)
Click Calculate to see your tax bracket and estimated tax owed
Review the breakdown showing how much is taxed at each rate

tdee-calculator.name: How to Calculate Your TDEE
tdee-calculator.description: Estimate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure and calorie targets using the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
steps: Choose your unit system and enter your weight and height.
Enter your age and select your gender.
Select your activity level, from Sedentary to Extra Active.
Optionally enter your body fat percentage for a more precise estimate.
Click Calculate to see your BMR, TDEE, and calorie targets for weight loss, maintenance, and muscle gain.

time-zone-converter.name: How to Convert Time Between Time Zones
time-zone-converter.description: Use the Time Zone Converter to convert a time from one world time zone to one or more others and plan meetings across regions.
steps: Select the source time zone you are converting from.
Enter the date and time, or click Use Current Time to fill in now.
Add one or more target time zones to convert to.
Review the converted local time in each target zone.
Use the business-hours overlap visualization to find a meeting window that works for everyone.

tip-calculator.name: How to Calculate a Tip at a Restaurant
tip-calculator.description: Quickly calculate the right tip amount and split the bill evenly among your group.
steps: Enter the total bill amount (pre-tax subtotal recommended)
Select or enter your desired tip percentage (15%, 18%, 20%, or custom)
Enter the number of people splitting the bill
Click Calculate to see the tip amount and per-person total
Review the split breakdown showing each person's share

unit-converter.name: How to Convert Between Units
unit-converter.description: Use the Unit Converter to convert values across length, weight, temperature, volume, area, speed, digital storage, and time.
steps: Select a category tab such as length, weight, temperature, or volume.
Enter the value you want to convert.
Choose the From unit and the To unit.
Click Calculate to see the result and equivalents in all related units.
Use the swap button to reverse the conversion direction instantly.

username-generator.name: How to generate a username
username-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch Username Generator to create unique usernames for gaming, social media, and online accounts in your chosen style.
steps: Enter a keyword or word you want included, if you have one in mind.
Choose a style, such as cool, funny, professional, or aesthetic, and decide whether to add numbers.
Click Generate to create multiple username ideas at once.
Review the suggestions and availability hints, and regenerate for more options.
Copy your favorite username and check that the exact handle is free on your target platform.

uuid-generator.name: How to generate a UUID
uuid-generator.description: Use the CalcCrunch UUID Generator to create version 4 UUIDs in single or bulk batches and copy or download them for your projects.
steps: Select a batch size, from 1 up to 100 UUIDs.
Choose a format: standard, no hyphens, uppercase, braces, or URN.
Click Generate UUIDs to create the identifiers in your browser.
Copy individual UUIDs, use Copy All, or download the full list as a text file.
Optionally paste a UUID into the validator to confirm it is correctly formatted.

wedding-budget-calculator.name: How to plan your wedding budget
wedding-budget-calculator.description: Create a personalized wedding budget with category allocations based on your total and guest count.
steps: Enter your total wedding budget (the maximum you want to spend).
Set your guest count, which drives venue, catering, and per-person costs.
Select your region, since location strongly affects vendor pricing.
Choose your style and preferences such as season, style, and ceremony type.
Toggle categories on or off to include or exclude vendors.
Click Calculate Budget to see your personalized allocation with vendor ranges and tips.
